settings.editor:
Build Stronger Project Managers.
Strengthen Your AEC Firm.

From free learning resources to tailored leadership development
and certification, EMI helps Architecture, Engineering, and Construction
professionals master both the people side and the technical
side of project management.
In the AEC industry, technical skills aren’t enough. Great project outcomes depend on project managers who can lead people, manage risk, and deliver results.

settings.description_text: Development programs and certification designed exclusively for AEC professionals.
We focus on habits and human dynamics not just tools.
Certified PMs consistently deliver stronger projects, happier clients, and better retention.

settings.editor:
The AEC PM Certification is the culmination of EMI’s full
learning ecosystem, everything we offer leads here.

settings.text: Learn more about the AEC PM Certification

settings.title:
Develop your team through Custom or
Standard Learning Development Programs

settings.editor: When your firm is ready to take action, EMI offers both standard and custom programs tailored to your team’s needs.

settings.description_text: Team-wide PM training or leadership development

settings.editor: Our custom development programs are the foundation that prepares your team for certification success.

The AEC PM Certification represents the highest standard of project management performance in the industry. Participants earn a credential that signals leadership excellence and practical PM capability, recognized across the AEC sector.
Get Certified with Self-Paced Certification
Explore Custom Programs leading to AEC Certification
Certification isn’t the finish line, it's the launching pad. Stay connected with ongoing development opportunities:

AEC PM Connect Events

in-person gatherings for certified PMs and firm leaders.

Webinars & Live Workshops

regular webinars for PMs and AEC Leadership, including PDH webinars

PM Assist

micro-learning videos and live PDH webinars, exclusively for AEC PM Certification holders.
